reasoning_messages.reasoning:
We need to propose a plan. Remember workflow: 1. PLAN description. 2. Call review_plan. 3. If approved, apply. We have to use read_file, write_file etc.

We need to edit /etc/opensc.conf adding card_drivers = ; inside app default block.

We should backup, check block exists.

The plan: read_file /etc/opensc.conf. If 'app default {' exists and closing '}' appears. Use sed to either replace existing card_drivers or insert if missing. We must ensure not to duplicate.

We need to escape special characters in card_drivers string? It's an empty value for var maybe. We can set card_drivers = ;? but to set to organization list? The requirement says default is empty. Let's set to empty.

We must produce plan_description string.

We will propose: 1) read_file /etc/opensc.conf to verify existence. 2) If not exist, fail. 3) Search for 'app default {' and matching '}'. 4) Use sed with block-range to add or replace card_drivers line. Use pattern: sed -n '/^app default {/,/^}/p' but to modify in-place: sed -i '/app default {/,/^}/ { /card_drivers=/d; a card_drivers = ; }' . This will delete existing card_drivers lines and append new line before closing brace. That ensures no duplicate.

We need backup: cp /etc/opensc.conf /etc/opensc.conf.bak.YYYYMMDDHHMMSS.

We need to handle errors: check exit code of sed.

Will we also maybe check file permissions? Not necessary.

Thus plan description: includes backup, verification of block, use sed.

Ok. Let's produce review_plan call.
